title: Driver Service Call Routing Flow
interaction_flow: Caller → make_driver_method: invoked with (arg_defs, driverInterface, driverName, driverMethod, settings) — returns async function
Caller → returned_fn: call(...args) — maps positional args or named-object to driverArgs
returned_fn → driverCall: driverCall(options, driverInterface, driverName, driverMethod, driverArgs, settings)
driverCall → createDeferred: creates {promise, resolve, reject}
driverCall → driverCall_: driverCall_(options, resolve, reject, driverInterface, driverName, driverMethod, driverArgs, undefined, 'text/plain;actually=json', settings)
driverCall_ → puter.ui.authenticateWithPuter: [if no authToken && env='web'] authenticate user, reject on cancel
driverCall_ → initXhr: initXhr('/drivers/call', puter.APIOrigin, undefined, 'POST', contentType) → XHR object
driverCall_ → XHR: xhr.send({interface, driver, test_mode, method, args, auth_token}) — POST /drivers/call
driverCall → deferred.promise: awaits resolution
XHR onreadystatechange(2) → [if Content-Type=application/x-ndjson]: is_stream=true, create async generator Stream, resolve_func(startedStream)
XHR onprogress → [if is_stream]: buffer NDJSON lines, signal_stream_update()
XHR onreadystatechange(4) → response_complete=true, signal_stream_update()
XHR load event → [non-stream]: parseResponse(response.target) → resp
XHR load → [if 401 / token_auth_failed]: retry auth or reject
XHR load → [if resp.success=false && code='permission_denied']: puter.ui.requestPermission, retry driverCall_ or reject
XHR load → [if resp.success=false other]: error_cb, reject_func(resp)
XHR load → [success]: settings.transform?(result), resolve_func(result)
--- SERVER SIDE ---
DriverService.call(o) → DriverService._call({driver, iface, method, args})
DriverService._call → DriverService._process_args(iface, method, args) → processed_args
_process_args → svc_registry.get('interfaces') → interface_ lookup; throw interface_not_found if missing
_process_args → interface_.methods[method_name] → throw method_not_found if missing
_process_args → for each param: c_types.get(arg_descriptor.type) → arg_behaviour.consolidate(ctx, value) → throw missing_required_argument / argument_consolidation_failed on error
DriverService._call → resolve driver name: iface_to_driver[iface] ?? iface (static map for legacy aliases)
DriverService._call → resolve iface: iface_to_iface[iface] ?? iface (maps puter-apps/subdomains/notifications → crud-q)
DriverService._call → [if test_mode && interface_to_test_service[iface]]: driver = test service name
DriverService._call → interface_service_aliases[iface][driver] or service_aliases[driver]: alias resolution
DriverService._call → get_service_or_throw_(driver, iface) → service
get_service_or_throw_ → services.has(name) && service.list_traits().includes(iface): check live service
get_service_or_throw_ → [if not found as live service]: svc_registry.get('drivers').get(iface+':'+name) → wrap plain driver object as AdvancedBase subclass
get_service_or_throw_ → [if nothing found]: throw no_implementation_available
DriverService._call → svc_event.emit('driver.create-call-context', event): build call context
DriverService._call → span(driver:iface:method) → context.arun → call_new_({actor, service, service_name, iface, method, args, skip_usage})
call_new_ → svc_permission.scan(actor, 'service:'+service_name+':ii:'+iface) → reading
call_new_ → PermissionUtil.reading_to_options(reading) → options; throw forbidden if none
call_new_ → select_best_option_(options) → option (returns options[0])
call_new_ → get_policies_for_option_(option) → policies (returns option.path)
call_new_ → find effective_policy (first with .holder); svc_su.sudo → svc_systemData.interpret(policy.data)
call_new_ → Invoker.create({ decorators: [rate-limit, add-metadata, result-coercion], delegate })
Invoker rate-limit decorator → svc_su.sudo(policy_holder) → svc_rateLimit.check_and_increment('V1:service:iface:method', max, period)
Invoker delegate → service.as(iface)[method](args): invoke actual implementation
Invoker add-metadata decorator → wraps result: {success:true, service:{name, version?}, result}
Invoker result-coercion decorator → [if TypedValue]: svc_coercion.coerce(desired_type, result)
call_new_ → invoker.run(args) → returns {success, service, result, metadata}
DriverService.call → [on error]: _driver_response_from_error(e) → {success:false, error: serialized}
key_relationships: driverCall delegates to driverCall_ (separates promise creation from XHR logic)
driverCall_ sends POST /drivers/call to DriverService.call on server
DriverService._call orchestrates: _process_args → alias resolution → get_service_or_throw_ → call_new_
call_new_ depends_on PermissionService (scan), RateLimitService (check_and_increment), SystemDataService (interpret policy), SuService (sudo)
call_new_ uses Invoker (decorator chain) to wrap service.as(iface)[method](args)
register_driver stores interface_name → implementation in interface_to_implementation map
register_service_alias stores alias → real service name (optionally scoped to iface)

driver_registration.register_service_alias: register_service_alias(service_name, alias, {iface?}) — stores in service_aliases or interface_service_aliases[iface]

static_iface_mappings.iface_to_driver: puter-ocr→aws-textract, puter-tts→aws-polly, puter-speech2speech→elevenlabs-voice-changer, puter-speech2txt→openai-speech2txt, puter-chat-completion→openai-completion, puter-image-generation→openai-image-generation, puter-video-generation→ai-video, puter-apps→es:app, puter-subdomains→es:subdomain, puter-notifications→es:notification

streaming_support: driverCall_ detects Content-Type: application/x-ndjson; creates async generator Stream yielding parsed JSON lines; resolves promise immediately with stream object
important_notes: Two-layer: client-side (puter-js utils.js) builds XHR call to /drivers/call; server-side DriverService routes to implementing service via alias resolution, permission checks, and Invoker decorator chain. DriverService itself implements the 'driver' interface (IMPLEMENTS static). Streaming NDJSON is transparent to the server routing logic.
